data.title: As a plugin operator, scripts resolve sibling plugin files portably regardless of install path
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Migrate all runtime path constructions in .sh scripts under plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/hooks/ to use `_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)/..}"` declared near the top of each script. Update grep/git search directory patterns from `plugins/dso/` to `${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/`. Identify grep/glob patterns that match against git-relative path output and annotate them with `# plugin-self-ref-ok: git-relative path pattern`.
**Why**: Scripts that construct paths like $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh fail in host projects where the plugin is installed at a different path.
**Scope**:
- IN: All runtime path constructions in .sh files under plugins/dso/ referencing sibling plugin files; grep/git search directory patterns using plugins/dso/; annotation of git-relative pattern matching cases
- OUT: Comment lines in scripts (S1); markdown files (S3); Python files (already handled)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all .sh scripts under plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/hooks/ that reference sibling plugin files declare _PLUGIN_ROOT using the canonical pattern and use ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ for all plugin-relative path constructions
  ← Satisfies: "All scripts use _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and pass a test"
- When this story is complete, a test confirms _PLUGIN_ROOT resolves correctly when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is set (shim context) and when it is unset (direct invocation via BASH_SOURCE[0]-based fallback)
  ← Satisfies: "pass a test confirming resolution from both shim context and direct invocation"
- When this story is complete, grep/glob patterns that match against git-relative paths (git diff --name-only output, git show path prefixes, case statement file path matching) are annotated with `# plugin-self-ref-ok: git-relative path pattern` and excluded from the zero-occurrence count
  ← Satisfies: "grep -r 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/ returns zero matches (after accounting for suppressed lines)"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Validate _PLUGIN_ROOT from both CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT set and direct invocation contexts
- [Reliability] _PLUGIN_ROOT fallback must handle scripts called from non-standard working directories (the `cd ... && pwd` form resolves symlinks and normalizes the path)
- [Maintainability] _PLUGIN_ROOT declaration must be consistent across all scripts — same pattern verbatim
- [Scope boundary] Git-relative pattern matching in SAFEGUARD_PATTERNS (review-complexity-classifier.sh), _REF_PATTERN (check-referential-integrity.sh), reviewer glob patterns (pre-commit-review-gate.sh), git-diff filters (check-plugin-boundary.sh, check-shim-refs.sh) cannot use ${_PLUGIN_ROOT} since git returns repo-relative paths. Annotate these with `# plugin-self-ref-ok: git-relative path pattern`.
- [Technical debt] deps.sh resolve_repo_root() uses `cd ../..` relative to CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT to derive repo root, which assumes the plugin is exactly two directory levels deep. Document as a known limitation or remove the fallback in favor of `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
